TITLE: Thirtysixth · Monday Music Mix
EYEBROW: Mix detail
H1: Thirtysixth
COPY: Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally should’ve been out in the wild. Some new, some old and reimagined.
BUTTON: Back to archive
EYEBROW: Listening

TEXT: 1 YouTube queue

TRACK: 14 Love You Better (John Dillinger remix) — Oh Land Favorite Queue above
EYEBROW: Context
H2: Archive notes
COPY: Contains some of the best music I have heard in a quite a192 while.

EYEBROW: Archive cleanup
H3: Cleanup choices
TEXT: A legacy Mega download URL survives in the archived source data, but it is intentionally withheld from the published page.
TEXT: The exact Tumblr-hosted cover image has been downloaded locally and now fills the canonical cover slot for this mix.
EYEBROW: Preserved residue
H3: Legacy snapshot
TEXT: A sanitized copy of the original post HTML is kept for repair and import cleanup work.
TEXT: It still preserves the original Tumblr heading, favorite-track cue, and download trace.
